document.title: Product Requirements Document: Alloy Framework TypeSpec Emitter

product_overview.name: @microsoft/http-client-js
product_overview.description: A TypeSpec-to-TypeScript code emitter built on the Alloy Framework that generates modular TypeScript client SDKs for REST services. This is a ground-up rewrite of the legacy autorest.typescript/typespec-ts emitter, replacing ts-morph imperative AST manipulation with declarative Alloy JSX components.
product_overview.problem_statement: The legacy emitter (autorest.typescript/packages/typespec-ts) suffers from: (1) overly complex code using raw string concatenation and manual import management, (2) fragile string-based reference resolution causing self-import bugs, (3) monolithic helper files (2700+ lines) that are hard to maintain, (4) no framework for symbol tracking or cross-file reference management. These issues increase maintenance cost, slow feature development, and introduce subtle bugs.
product_overview.solution: Rewrite the emitter using Alloy Framework JSX components with automatic symbol resolution, refkey-based cross-file references, and composable component architecture. The rewrite must produce output-identical TypeScript SDKs to prevent breaking changes for existing Azure SDK consumers.
target_users: TypeSpec SDK authors generating TypeScript client libraries
Azure SDK team generating Azure service client SDKs
Internal Microsoft teams generating REST client code from TypeSpec definitions

goals.title: Output Parity
goals.description: Generated TypeScript SDK code must be functionally identical to the legacy emitter output. The public API surface (exported types, function signatures, class shapes) must not change.
goals.success_metric: All 101 scenario tests pass with matching output (modulo whitespace and import ordering)

goals.title: Pure Alloy Architecture
goals.description: The entire emitter must use idiomatic Alloy patterns: JSX components, refkeys for all declarations/references, code tagged templates, context providers. No legacy bridges, no string concatenation for imports, no manual path calculation.
goals.success_metric: Zero instances of manual import string construction or string-based reference resolution in codebase

goals.title: Composable Azure Extension
goals.description: Core emitter works standalone for non-Azure scenarios. Azure-specific features (auth, logging, polling, cloud settings) are added via JSX composition, not conditional flags.
goals.success_metric: Core emitter generates valid non-Azure SDK; Azure wrapper adds Azure-specific features without modifying core components

goals.title: Maintainability
goals.description: Dramatically reduce code complexity compared to legacy emitter. Each component has single responsibility, is independently testable, and is under 300 lines.
goals.success_metric: No component file exceeds 300 lines; each component has at least one test

goals.title: Developer Experience
goals.description: New components are easy to add and test. The component architecture makes it straightforward to extend the emitter for new features.
goals.success_metric: Adding a new feature (e.g., new serialization format) requires creating a new component, not modifying existing ones

non_goals.title: RLC (Rest Level Client) Rewrite
non_goals.description: The RLC code path will NOT be ported. Only the modular path is being rewritten.

non_goals.title: typespec-test Package
non_goals.description: The integration test package (typespec-test) will not be ported in this phase.

non_goals.title: Behavioral Changes
non_goals.description: This rewrite must NOT introduce behavioral changes to generated code. Output parity is the primary constraint.

non_goals.title: New Features
non_goals.description: No new code generation features will be added during the rewrite. Feature parity only.

non_goals.title: Runtime Library Changes
non_goals.description: No changes to @typespec/ts-http-runtime or Azure runtime packages.

functional.title: TypeSpec Emitter Integration
functional.description: Implement $onEmit hook that receives TypeSpec EmitContext, initializes TCGC SdkContext, builds Alloy JSX component tree, and writes output files.
acceptance_criteria: Emitter registers via TypeSpec lib definition
Extracts SdkPackage with clients, models, enums
Emits TypeScript files to configured output directory
functional.implementation_notes: Emitter entry point ($onEmit) implemented in emitter.tsx. Registers with TypeSpec compiler, calls createSdkContext(), builds JSX tree, renders via writeOutput().

functional.title: Model Type Generation
functional.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces from SdkModelType, including properties, inheritance, discriminators, additional properties, and documentation.
acceptance_criteria: JSDoc documentation from SDK model doc/summary

functional.title: Enum Type Generation
functional.description: Generate TypeScript enums from SdkEnumType with the KnownXXX pattern for extensible enums.
acceptance_criteria: Extensible enums → KnownXXX enum + type XXX = string alias
functional.implementation_notes: EnumDeclaration component generates type alias + KnownXXX enum from SdkEnumType. Handles fixed (union of literals) and extensible (base type) patterns. 7 unit tests.

functional.title: Union Type Generation
functional.description: Generate TypeScript union type aliases from SdkUnionType.
acceptance_criteria: SdkUnionType → type XXX = A | B | C
Variant types correctly referenced via refkeys
functional.implementation_notes: UnionDeclaration component generates type alias from SdkUnionType using <For> with joiner for pipe-separated variant types. Uses getTypeExpression() for variant resolution and typeRefkey() for declaration identity. 7 unit tests cover mixed primitives, model variants, JSDoc docs, single-variant edge case, and cross-reference via refkey.

functional.title: JSON Serialization
functional.description: Generate serializer and deserializer functions for all model types used in request/response bodies.
acceptance_criteria: Serializer function per model with Input usage
Deserializer function per model with Output/Exception usage
Property name mapping (client name → wire name and vice versa)
Nested model types call child serializer refkeys
Array types use .map() with child serializer
functional.implementation_notes: JsonSerializer and JsonDeserializer components generate serializer/deserializer functions from SdkModelType. Serializers map client names to wire names, deserializers reverse. Handles nested models (child serializer calls via refkey), arrays (.map() with child serializer), optional properties (null-check ternary guards), and simple passthrough types. Uses Alloy ObjectExpression/ObjectProperty for proper formatting. Integrated into ModelFiles orchestrator with Usage flag filtering (Input for serializers, Output/Exception for deserializers). 15 unit tests.

functional.title: Polymorphic Serialization
functional.description: Generate discriminated union serializers that switch on discriminator property to route to subtype serializers.
acceptance_criteria: Each case routes to subtype serializer/deserializer refkey
Parameter type uses polymorphicTypeRefkey (union type, not base)

functional.title: XML Serialization
functional.description: Generate XML serializer/deserializer functions (4 per type) using metadata-driven approach.
acceptance_criteria: 4 functions per type: serializer, objectSerializer, deserializer, objectDeserializer
Property metadata arrays with XML options
functional.implementation_notes: XML serialization implemented via XmlSerializer, XmlObjectSerializer, XmlDeserializer, XmlObjectDeserializer components. Metadata-driven approach with 4 functions per model. XmlHelpersFile provides static helper functions. 14 unit tests.

functional.title: Operation Generation
functional.description: Generate operation functions with the send/deserialize/public pattern for each API operation.
acceptance_criteria: _sendXXX function builds HTTP request (URL, headers, query, body)
_deserializeXXX function processes response (status check, body parse, headers)
Public xxx function calls send → deserialize
Operations grouped by operation group path
Each group in separate source file under src/api/
functional.notes: Send function (3.2), Deserialize function (3.3), and Public operation function (3.4) are all implemented. Remaining: Operations orchestrator (3.5) to group operations into files.
functional.implementation_notes: All 5 sub-tasks complete: OperationOptionsDeclaration (3.1), SendOperation (3.2), DeserializeOperation (3.3), PublicOperation (3.4), OperationFiles orchestrator (3.5). Operations grouped by path prefix into separate source files under api/.

functional.title: Operation Options
functional.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces for optional operation parameters.
functional.notes: OperationOptionsDeclaration component generates OptionalParams interfaces. Supports LRO updateIntervalInMs, dual-format contentType, JSDoc, and OperationOptions extension.

functional.title: Client Context
functional.description: Generate client context interface and factory function.
acceptance_criteria: API version property for versioned services
Factory function with endpoint, credentials, options parameters
functional.implementation_notes: ClientContextFile generates context interface extending Client, options interface extending ClientOptions, and factory function with endpoint/credential/options handling. Handles URL templates, API version, telemetry.

functional.title: Classical Client Class
functional.description: Generate the user-facing client class wrapping operation-level API.
acceptance_criteria: Operation methods delegating to API functions
Operation group getters for nested groups
functional.implementation_notes: ClassicalClientFile generates class with private _client field, public pipeline property, constructor calling factory function, operation methods delegating to API functions, and operation group getters.

functional.title: Classical Operation Groups
functional.description: Generate operation group interfaces and factory functions for hierarchical client APIs.
functional.implementation_notes: ClassicalOperationGroupFiles generates interface per group level, factory function returning operation methods, nested group properties, and LRO helper methods.

functional.title: LRO Support
functional.description: Support long-running operations with polling and restore capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: RestorePoller helper generated for state restoration
URL template matching for operation routing
functional.implementation_notes: RestorePollerFile generates LRO restore poller helper. PollingHelpersFile provides getLongRunningPoller. Operations wrapped with getLongRunningPoller via PublicOperation component.

functional.title: Paging Support
functional.description: Support paginated operations with async iterators.
functional.implementation_notes: PagingHelpersFile provides buildPagedAsyncIterator, PagedAsyncIterableIterator, PageSettings. Paging operations wrapped in PublicOperation component.

functional.title: Multipart Support
functional.description: Support multipart form data request bodies.
functional.implementation_notes: MultipartSerializer generates multipart form-data serialization. MultipartHelpersFile provides FileContents type and createFilePartDescriptor function. 6 unit tests.

functional.title: Index/Barrel Files
functional.description: Generate proper export structure with root and subpath index files.
acceptance_criteria: Root index.ts exports clients, models, options, helper types
Subpath index.ts in api/, models/, classic/
Serializer functions excluded from public exports
functional.implementation_notes: IndexFiles generates root index.ts, models/index.ts, api/index.ts, classic/index.ts barrel files with selective exports. Internal _prefixed symbols excluded.

functional.title: Static Helper Files
functional.description: Emit static helper source files (serialization utils, collection builders, URL template, etc.).
acceptance_criteria: Each helper has refkey declaration for cross-file reference
Import remapping for Azure vs non-Azure packages
functional.implementation_notes: StaticHelpers orchestrator renders 5 helper files: serializationHelpers.ts, pagingHelpers.ts, pollingHelpers.ts, multipartHelpers.ts, xmlHelpers.ts. Each uses refkeys for cross-file reference.

functional.title: Sample Generation
functional.implementation_notes: SampleFiles generates per-operation sample files in samples-dev/. Handles OAuth2/API key credentials, endpoint env vars, operation calls. 18 unit tests.

functional.title: Logger File
functional.description: Generate logger module for Azure-flavored SDKs.
acceptance_criteria: Package name derived from package details
functional.implementation_notes: LoggerFile component generates logger.ts with createClientLogger() from @azure/logger. Takes packageName prop for the logger namespace. Exports logger via refkey for cross-file references. 7 unit tests cover import generation, export, package name embedding, const declaration, refkey resolution, and legacy output parity.

non_functional.title: Output Parity
non_functional.description: Generated TypeScript code must match legacy emitter output. All 101 scenario tests must pass.

non_functional.title: Performance
non_functional.description: Emitter performance should be comparable to or better than legacy emitter for typical service specs.

non_functional.title: Code Quality
non_functional.description: All components follow Alloy idiomatic patterns. No anti-patterns (string-based refs, manual imports, monolithic code blocks).

non_functional.title: Testability
non_functional.description: Every component is independently testable with the Alloy testing utilities (toRenderTo matcher, TypeSpec test host).

non_functional.title: Extensibility
non_functional.description: Azure-specific features addable via JSX composition without modifying core components.

framework.name: Alloy Framework
framework.description: JSX-based code generation framework. NOT React. Uses JSX purely as structural description language for code output. Provides automatic symbol resolution, cross-file import management, and naming policies.

sdk_model.name: TCGC (TypeSpec Client Generator Core)
sdk_model.description: Provides SdkPackage object model that pre-computes data from TypeSpec definitions. Language-agnostic SDK type system with clients, operations, models, enums, and type metadata.

technical_architecture.data_flow: TypeSpec Input → Compiler → TCGC SdkPackage → Alloy JSX Components → Symbol Tree → TypeScript Files

key_concepts.refkeys: Symbolic reference keys created via refkey(entity, discriminator). Each declaration gets a refkey; references use the same refkey. Alloy resolves cross-file references and auto-generates imports.
key_concepts.code_templates: Tagged template literals (code`...`) that treat interpolated refkeys as live symbolic references. Alloy tracks them and resolves imports automatically.
key_concepts.context_providers: Named contexts via createNamedContext() for dependency injection. Eliminates prop drilling across deeply nested component trees.
key_concepts.external_packages: NPM packages defined via createPackage() with typed symbol accessors. Used in code templates for auto-import from runtime libraries.

test_categories.description: Markdown-based tests ported from legacy emitter. Each .md file contains TypeSpec input and expected TypeScript output blocks. Tests validate output parity between legacy and new emitter.
test_categories.format: H1 = test name, ```tsp = TypeSpec input, ```typescript <type> = expected output

test_categories.description: JSX component tests using Alloy's toRenderTo matcher. Compile TypeSpec snippets, render components, assert output text.
Pure function tests for utilities (refkey helpers, type mapping, etc.).

test_infrastructure.test_host: test/test-host.ts — Tester instance with TypeSpec library imports
test_infrastructure.scenario_harness: test/scenarios/scenarios.spec.ts — MD file parser + assertion engine

unacceptable_differences: Public API surface changes (exported types, function signatures)

implementation_phases.name: Project Foundation & Infrastructure
implementation_phases.description: Set up dependencies, emitter entry point, context system, refkey helpers, external packages, and test infrastructure.

tasks.title: Add Dependencies
tasks.description: Add TCGC, TypeSpec compiler, emitter framework, and testing dependencies to package.json
pass_criteria: package.json includes @azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-core, @typespec/compiler, @typespec/http, @typespec/rest, @typespec/versioning, @typespec/emitter-framework
pnpm install completes without errors
TypeScript can resolve all new package imports without type errors

tasks.title: Emitter Entry Point
tasks.description: Create src/emitter.tsx with $onEmit hook, TCGC initialization, JSX tree, and writeOutput()
pass_criteria: src/emitter.tsx exists with exported $onEmit function
$onEmit calls createSdkContext() and extracts sdkPackage
JSX component tree renders via writeOutput() without runtime errors
Emitter can be invoked by TypeSpec compiler on a minimal .tsp file
Uses idiomatic Alloy Output component with namePolicy and externals

tasks.title: SDK Context Provider
tasks.description: Create src/context/sdk-context.tsx with named context, provider component, and useSdkContext() hook
pass_criteria: SdkContext created via createNamedContext() from @alloy-js/core
SdkContextProvider component wraps children and provides sdkPackage, program, options
useSdkContext() hook returns typed context value
Child components can access SDK data without prop drilling
TypeScript types are correct (no any casts)

tasks.title: Refkey Helpers
tasks.description: Create src/utils/refkeys.ts with all refkey helper functions (typeRefkey, serializerRefkey, etc.)
pass_criteria: All refkey helpers use refkey() from @alloy-js/core (NOT legacy framework refkey)
Same entity + discriminator always returns the same refkey (deterministic)
Different discriminators return different refkeys for the same entity

Helpers cover: typeRefkey, serializerRefkey, deserializerRefkey, polymorphicTypeRefkey, knownValuesRefkey, operationOptionsRefkey, clientContextRefkey, createClientRefkey, classicalClientRefkey, xmlSerializerRefkey, xmlDeserializerRefkey, serializationHelperRefkey, pagingHelperRefkey, pollingHelperRefkey
Unit test validates refkey identity and uniqueness

tasks.title: External Package Definitions
tasks.description: Create src/utils/external-packages.ts with createPackage() definitions for runtime libs
pass_criteria: httpRuntimeLib defined via createPackage() with all @typespec/ts-http-runtime exports (Client, getClient, Pipeline, RestError, OperationOptions, StreamableMethod, etc.)
Package symbols accessible as typed refkeys (e.g., httpRuntimeLib.Client)
Azure package definitions prepared (azureCoreDeps, azurePollingDeps, azureIdentityDeps)
Packages can be registered in Output component's externals prop
code templates with package symbols resolve correctly in a test render

tasks.title: Test Infrastructure
tasks.description: Create test-host.ts, utils.tsx, vitest.d.ts, and port scenario test harness
pass_criteria: test/test-host.ts creates Tester instance with @typespec/http and @typespec/versioning libraries
test/utils.tsx provides TestFile and DeclarationTestFile wrapper components
test/vitest.d.ts declares toRenderTo and toRenderToAsync custom matchers
A sample component render test compiles, runs, and passes with vitest
toRenderTo matcher correctly compares rendered Alloy output
vitest run executes without configuration errors

implementation_phases.name: Models & Type Declarations
implementation_phases.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces, enums, type aliases, and union types from TCGC types.

tasks.title: Type Expression Component
tasks.description: Map SdkType to TypeScript type strings/refkeys for all type kinds
pass_criteria: Handles all SdkType kinds: model, enum, union, array, dict, nullable, built-in scalars, datetime, duration, bytes
Model types return typeRefkey(type) for cross-file reference
Scalar mappings match legacy: string→string, int32→number, int64→bigint, float→number, boolean→boolean, utcDateTime→Date, bytes→Uint8Array, duration→string
Array types produce T[] with recursive element type resolution
Dict types produce Record<K, V>
Nullable types produce T | null
Component render test validates each type kind

tasks.title: Model Interface Component
tasks.description: Generate ts.InterfaceDeclaration from SdkModelType with properties, inheritance, discriminators
pass_criteria: Produces <ts.InterfaceDeclaration> with correct name, refkey, and export
Properties rendered as <ts.InterfaceMember> with correct name, type, optional, readonly
Base model inheritance via extends prop on InterfaceDeclaration
Discriminator property rendered with correct literal type
Additional properties support (additionalProperties → Record<string, unknown> index signature)
Flattened properties expanded inline (not nested)
JSDoc documentation from SDK model.doc and model.summary
Scenario tests pass: models/models.md model interfaces match legacy output

tasks.title: Enum Declaration Component
tasks.description: Generate KnownXXX enum + extensible type alias pattern from SdkEnumType
pass_criteria: Fixed enums (isFixed=true) produce standard TypeScript enum
Extensible enums produce KnownXXX enum + type XXX = string alias
Enum members have correct name and value
JSDoc documentation on enum and members
Refkey set on both enum and type alias declarations
Scenario tests pass: enumUnion/enumUnion.md, models/apiVersion/*.md

tasks.title: Union Type Component
tasks.description: Generate type alias from SdkUnionType
pass_criteria: Produces type XXX = A | B | C with correct variant type references
Variant types use refkeys for cross-file reference when they are models
String/number literal union variants rendered correctly
Nullable unions include | null
Refkey set on type alias declaration

tasks.title: Polymorphic Type Component
tasks.description: Generate discriminated union type alias
pass_criteria: Produces type XXX = SubA | SubB | SubC from discriminatedSubtypes
Uses polymorphicTypeRefkey(type) as declaration refkey
Each subtype referenced via typeRefkey(subtype)
Only generated for models with discriminatedSubtypes
Used as parameter type in polymorphic serializers

tasks.title: ModelFiles Orchestrator
tasks.description: Organize models by namespace, unify declarations + serializers in same SourceFile
pass_criteria: Models organized into src/models/{namespace}/models.ts per namespace
Type declarations and serializers unified in same <ts.SourceFile> (no self-imports)
Ordering: model declarations first, then serializers, then XML serializers
Empty model files (no declarations) not emitted
All model types from sdkPackage.models processed
Cross-namespace references resolved via refkeys (auto-imports between model files)

implementation_phases.name: Serialization & Deserialization
implementation_phases.description: Generate JSON and XML serializer/deserializer functions for all model types.

tasks.title: JSON Serializer Component
tasks.description: Generate xxxSerializer functions with property mapping, nested calls, array/dict handling
pass_criteria: Produces function xxxSerializer(item: Xxx): any with correct refkey
Property mapping: item.propName → result['wireName'] for each property
Nested model properties call child serializerRefkey via code template
Array properties use .map() with child serializer
Dict properties use serializeRecord() static helper refkey
Null/undefined checks for optional properties
Additional properties spread into result object
Flatten properties correctly navigate nested paths
Only generated for types with Usage.Input flag
Scenario tests pass: models/serialization/propertyType.md

tasks.title: JSON Deserializer Component
tasks.description: Generate xxxDeserializer functions mirroring serializer structure
pass_criteria: Produces function xxxDeserializer(item: any): Xxx with correct refkey
Property mapping: item['wireName'] → result.propName (reverse of serializer)
Nested model properties call child deserializerRefkey
Array deserialization with .map() and child deserializer
Dict deserialization mirroring serializer
Only generated for types with Usage.Output or Usage.Exception flag
Scenario tests pass: models/deserialization/propertyType.md

tasks.title: Polymorphic Serialization
tasks.description: Discriminated union switch-based serialization/deserialization
pass_criteria: Switch statement on discriminator property value
Each case routes to subtype-specific serializer/deserializer refkey
Parameter type uses polymorphicTypeRefkey (union type, not base interface)
Deserializer return type uses polymorphicTypeRefkey
Default case handles unknown discriminator values
All subtypes in discriminatedSubtypes have corresponding cases

tasks.title: XML Serializer Components
tasks.description: 4 functions per type using metadata-driven approach
pass_criteria: Generates 4 functions per type: serializer, objectSerializer, deserializer, objectDeserializer
Uses metadata arrays with XML property descriptors
Calls serializeToXml/deserializeFromXml static helper refkeys
Handles XML namespaces, attributes, and element names
Correct refkeys set: xmlSerializerRefkey, xmlObjectSerializerRefkey, xmlDeserializerRefkey, xmlObjectDeserializerRefkey
Scenario tests pass: payload/xml/*.md

tasks.title: Static Serialization Helpers
tasks.description: Refkey declarations and source loading for all 21 static helper files
pass_criteria: Refkey declarations for all static helpers: collection builders (csv, multi, newline, pipe, ssv, tsv), collection parsers, serializers, serialize-record, check-prop-undefined, xml-helpers, get-binary-response
Helper source files loaded and emitted as <ts.SourceFile> with proper declarations
Each helper function has a refkey that can be referenced from other components
Helpers only included in output when referenced (demand-driven)
Import remapping works for Azure vs non-Azure package references
Also covers: pagingHelpers, pollingHelpers, simplePollerHelpers, urlTemplate, multipartHelpers, cloudSettingHelpers

implementation_phases.name: Operations
implementation_phases.description: Generate operation functions with send/deserialize pattern.

tasks.title: Operation Options Component
tasks.description: Generate options interfaces extending OperationOptions
pass_criteria: Interface extends OperationOptions from runtime package (via refkey)
Optional method parameters included with correct types
LRO operations include updateIntervalInMs?: number
Dual-format (JSON/XML) operations include contentType?: string
JSDoc documentation from parameter descriptions
Refkey set via operationOptionsRefkey(method)
Auto-generated contentType/accept headers excluded from options

tasks.title: Send Function Component
tasks.description: Generate _sendXXX functions building HTTP requests
pass_criteria: Async function _xxxSend(context: XxxContext, ...params): StreamableMethod
URL path built with parameter substitution (using urlTemplate helper or template literals)
Request headers constructed (Content-Type, Accept, custom headers)
Query parameters assembled correctly (collection formats, explode)
Request body serialized using serializer refkeys
context.path(...).method(options) call pattern
Path parameters with allowReserved handled correctly
Scenario tests pass: operations/operations.md send functions match

tasks.title: Deserialize Function Component
tasks.description: Generate _deserializeXXX functions processing responses
pass_criteria: Async function _xxxDeserialize(result: PathUncheckedResponse): Promise<T>
Expected status codes checked; unexpected throws createRestError
Response body deserialized using deserializer refkeys
Response headers extracted when needed
Binary/stream responses handled (Uint8Array return)
Exception body deserialized for error responses
XML response deserialization supported
Scenario tests pass: operations/operations.md deserialize functions match

tasks.title: Public Operation Function
tasks.description: Generate public xxx functions (standard, LRO, paging patterns)
pass_criteria: Standard: async function xxx(context, ...params) calls _send() then _deserialize()
LRO: wraps with getLongRunningPoller() from polling helpers
Paging: wraps with buildPagedAsyncIterator() from paging helpers
LRO+Paging: combined handling
Correct return types for each pattern
JSDoc documentation from operation metadata
Scenario tests pass: operations/lroPaging.md
tasks.notes: PublicOperation component generates public async functions (standard), with LRO (PollerLike) and paging (PagedAsyncIterableIterator) support. 8 tests covering GET, POST, DELETE void, JSDoc, refkey, path params, body forwarding, optional-only params.

tasks.title: Operations Orchestrator
tasks.description: Group and organize operations by operation group path
pass_criteria: Operations grouped by operation group hierarchy
Each group emits src/api/{group}/operations.ts
Each file contains: send + deserialize + public function per operation
All functions exported with correct names
Operation group path correctly computed from client hierarchy
Scenario tests pass: apiOperations/apiOperations.md

implementation_phases.name: Client Infrastructure
implementation_phases.description: Generate client context interface, factory function, and logger.

tasks.title: Client Context Component
tasks.description: Generate context interface + factory function with credentials and pipeline

API version property included for versioned services
Factory function createXxx(endpoint, credentials?, options?) exported
Endpoint parameter with correct default or template
Credential handling: API key → KeyCredential, Bearer → TokenCredential, OAuth2 → TokenCredential
Pipeline configured via getClient() from runtime package
API version defaults set from TCGC metadata

implementation_phases.name: Classical Client
implementation_phases.description: Generate user-facing client class and operation groups.

Public pipeline: Pipeline readonly property

Child client getters for multi-client scenarios

Classic files emitted under src/classic/{group}/index.ts

implementation_phases.name: Advanced Features
implementation_phases.description: Implement LRO restore, multipart, and sample generation.

tasks.title: RestorePoller Component
tasks.description: Generate LRO restore poller with operation-to-deserializer mapping

Client construction with correct parameters
Parameter setup from TCGC examples (when available)
Credential setup (Azure credentials, API keys)
API call invocation with correct arguments
Scenario tests pass: samples/client/*.md, samples/operations/*.md, samples/parameters/*.md

tasks.title: Root Index Component
tasks.description: Generate root index.ts with filtered exports

Internal symbols (_prefixed) excluded from exports
Serializer/deserializer functions excluded from public exports
PagedAsyncIterableIterator, PageSettings, ContinuablePage exported for paging
SimplePollerLike exported for LRO
Azure cloud types exported for ARM scenarios
No duplicate exports

tasks.title: Subpath Index Component

models/index.ts re-exports from model namespace files
classic/index.ts re-exports from operation group interfaces (interfaces only)
Recursive index generation for nested directories
No internal helpers (pagingHelpers, pollingHelpers) in public indexes
Correct relative paths in export declarations

implementation_phases.name: Azure Flavor Extension
implementation_phases.description: Design and implement Azure-specific extensions via composition.

tasks.title: Azure Extension Points
tasks.description: Package swapping, auth policies, polling, identity, ARM features
pass_criteria: httpRuntimeLib swappable to Azure package references (@azure-rest/core-client, etc.)
Azure auth policies (Bearer challenge, custom headers) injectable
Azure polling dependencies (@azure/core-lro) usable via refkeys
Azure identity (DefaultAzureCredential) referenced in samples
ARM features: subscriptionId handling, cloud settings helpers
Logger uses @azure/logger instead of console
All Azure-specific scenario tests pass

tasks.title: Azure Composition Pattern
tasks.description: Core emitter + Azure wrapper via JSX composition
pass_criteria: Core emitter generates valid non-Azure SDK with @typespec/ts-http-runtime
Azure wrapper composes core components with Azure-specific additions
No if-else Azure checks inside core components
Azure extension does not modify core component source files
Both flavors produce correct output for their respective scenarios

implementation_phases.name: Test Porting & Validation
implementation_phases.description: Port all 101 scenario tests and validate output parity.

tasks.title: Test Harness
tasks.description: Adapt scenario test harness for vitest with MD parser and assertion engine
pass_criteria: Scenario harness reads .md files recursively from test/scenarios/
MD parser extracts TypeSpec input (```tsp) and expected output (```typescript <type>) blocks
All 14 output block types supported (models, operations, clientContext, classicClient, root index, samples, etc.)
assertEqualContent normalizes formatting before comparison (whitespace, import ordering)
SCENARIOS_UPDATE=true environment variable regenerates snapshots
vitest run --reporter=verbose shows individual scenario results
Harness integrates with vitest describe/it/expect API

tasks.title: Scenario Porting
tasks.description: Copy and adapt all 101 scenario .md files
pass_criteria: All 102 .md scenario files copied to test/scenarios/cases/
Directory structure preserved (models/, operations/, classicClient/, etc.)
Each .md file parseable by the test harness without errors
TypeSpec input blocks compile without errors via Tester
No modifications to expected output blocks (baseline preserved)

tasks.title: Validation
tasks.description: Run all tests, fix discrepancies, document acceptable differences. Progress: Fixed spread body serialization, import non-determinism, prettier non-idempotency. Implemented response header deserialization (DeserializeHeaders + DeserializeExceptionHeaders components). Reduced failures from 455 to 113. Remaining 113 failures are tracked in Phase 10 (Validation Fixes).
pass_criteria: All 101 scenario tests pass (vitest run reports 0 failures)
Public API surface identical to legacy emitter output
Only acceptable differences present: import ordering, whitespace, trailing commas
No self-import bugs in any generated output
No missing or extra exports compared to legacy
Documented list of any intentional differences with justification

implementation_phases.name: Validation Fixes — Remaining 124 Test Failures
implementation_phases.description: Tasks to fix the remaining 124 scenario test failures identified during validation. Categorized by root cause. Total: 124 failures across 9 categories.

tasks.title: Fix `samples` generation (51 failures)
tasks.description: All 51 sample test assertions fail because no sample files are emitted. The `SampleFiles` component (src/components/sample-files.tsx) returns undefined because `collectSampleInfos()` finds no operations with examples. TCGC's `operation.examples` array is empty even though the test scenarios define examples in JSON blocks. Root cause: The test scenarios define examples in `json for OperationId` blocks but TCGC isn't parsing these into the `operation.examples` array. Need to either: (a) ensure examples are properly loaded by TCGC, or (b) wire up example data from the test harness into the emitter.
tasks.error_pattern: No sample files found in emitted output

tasks.title: Fix XML serializer/deserializer function lookup (21 failures)
tasks.description: 21 XML serializer tests fail with 'Could not find function X in file src/models/models.ts'. The XML serializer components (xml-serializer.tsx, xml-deserializer.tsx, xml-object-serializer.tsx, xml-object-deserializer.tsx) use the correct naming convention (e.g., retentionPolicyXmlSerializer) but the functions cannot be found in the generated models.ts output. Need to investigate whether: (a) the XML serializers are being rendered at all, (b) they end up in a different file, or (c) there's a naming mismatch between what's generated and what the tests expect.
tasks.error_pattern: Could not find function "*Xml*" in file "src/models/models.ts"

tasks.title: Fix `operations` category resolution for grouped operations (17 failures)
tasks.description: 17 tests fail with 'No output file found for legacy category operations'. The test harness resolves the 'operations' category using regex `/api\/operations\.ts$/` which matches `src/api/operations.ts`. But the new emitter generates operations at grouped paths like `src/api/<group>/operations.ts` (e.g., `src/api/widgets/operations.ts`, `src/api/queryOperations/operations.ts`). The regex doesn't match these paths. Fix options: (a) update the harness regex to match grouped operation files, (b) concatenate all operation files for the 'operations' category, or (c) change the emitter to optionally generate flat operations files.
tasks.error_pattern: No output file found for legacy category "operations"

tasks.title: Fix `models:withOptions` category resolution (14 failures)
tasks.description: 14 tests fail with 'No output file found for legacy category models:withOptions'. The test harness resolves 'models:withOptions' using regex `/api\/options\.ts$/` expecting a file like `src/api/options.ts`. The new emitter doesn't generate a separate options file; operation options interfaces are generated inside the operation files (e.g., `src/api/<group>/operations.ts`). Fix options: (a) update the harness to look for options in operation files, (b) generate a separate options.ts file, or (c) update the harness to concatenate operation files and search for option interfaces within them.
tasks.error_pattern: No output file found for legacy category "models:withOptions"

tasks.title: Implement response header deserialization functions (11 failures)
tasks.description: 11 tests fail because header deserialization functions are not generated. Two types of functions are expected: (a) `_xxxDeserializeHeaders` for response headers on successful operations (e.g., `_getUserDeserializeHeaders`, `_getAccountInfoDeserializeHeaders`), and (b) `_xxxDeserializeExceptionHeaders` for error response headers (e.g., `_getWidgetDeserializeExceptionHeaders`). These functions extract typed header values from HTTP response headers (including conversion of strings to boolean, date, bytes). Currently, `deserialize-operation.tsx` only handles response body deserialization. This requires: (1) new DeserializeHeaders component, (2) new DeserializeExceptionHeaders component, (3) integration in operation-files.tsx, (4) support for `include-headers-in-response` config option from TCGC.
tasks.error_pattern: Could not find function "_*Deserialize*Headers" in file "src/api/operations.ts"

tasks.title: Fix enum union type alias generation (4 failures)
tasks.description: 4 tests fail because named union type aliases (LR, UD, LeftAndRight, UpAndDown) are not emitted in models.ts. The test scenario enumUnion/enumUnion.md expects type aliases like `export type LR = "left" | "right"`. The model-files.tsx correctly filters for `SdkUnionType` from `sdkPackage.unions`, and `UnionDeclaration` renders named unions. The issue is likely that these unions are either: (a) not being included in the `unions` array by TCGC, (b) being classified differently (e.g., as enum types), or (c) being filtered out by the `u.kind === "union"` check when they have enum members.
tasks.error_pattern: Could not find alias "*" in file "src/models/models.ts"

tasks.title: Fix model-only package root index generation (3 failures)
tasks.description: 3 tests fail because root index.ts is not generated for model-only packages (no operations, just models). In `index-file.tsx`, `RootIndexFile()` returns undefined when `clients.length === 0`. For model-only packages with `@usage` annotation, models.ts IS generated but root index.ts is not. The fix: modify `RootIndexFile()` to generate index.ts even without clients if models/enums/unions exist. Also handle the case where no models should be generated (without @usage) — the test expects an empty output with only helper files.
tasks.error_pattern: No output file found for legacy category "root index" / "models"

tasks.title: Fix multipart request type underscore prefix (2 failures)
tasks.description: 2 tests fail because the multipart request type `_UploadFileRequest` and its serializer `_uploadFileRequestSerializer` are generated without the underscore prefix. The test expects internal/anonymous types to have an underscore prefix (e.g., `_UploadFileRequest` instead of `UploadFileRequest`). The multipart model interface is generated in model-files.tsx and serialized via multipart-serializer.tsx. Need to detect when a model is an internal/anonymous request type and prefix its name with underscore.

tasks.title: Fix empty project classicClient output (1 failure)
tasks.description: 1 test fails because the empty project generates only helper files (no client file). The test `emptyProject/emptyProject.md` expects a `classicClient` category but the emitter only generates static helper files when `sdkPackage.clients` is empty. This may be a test expectation issue (the expected output is likely empty) rather than a real generation bug — the test harness throws when it can't resolve the 'classicClient' category. Fix: either update the harness to handle empty expected output for classicClient, or update the test expectation, or conditionally skip the classicClient assertion when no clients exist.
tasks.error_pattern: No output file found for legacy category "classicClient"

risks.title: Output Parity Failures
risks.description: Generated code may differ from legacy emitter in ways that break existing Azure SDK consumers.
risks.mitigation: Run scenario tests incrementally during each phase. Accept only cosmetic differences (import ordering, whitespace).

risks.title: Alloy Version Incompatibilities
risks.description: Alloy API changes between versions may require migration work.
risks.mitigation: Pin to @alloy-js/*@0.22.0. Update deliberately with version bumps.

risks.title: TCGC API Surface Changes
risks.description: TCGC types may evolve during development, requiring adaptation.
risks.mitigation: Pin TCGC version. Monitor TCGC releases and adapt incrementally.

risks.title: Self-Import Bugs
risks.description: Separate SourceFile elements for related declarations (types + serializers) cause Alloy to generate self-imports.
risks.mitigation: Always unify declarations and serializers in same SourceFile via ModelFiles pattern.

risks.title: Static Helper Loading Complexity
risks.description: 21 helper files with varied formats need proper refkey registration and source loading.
risks.mitigation: Start with refkey declarations. Load helper sources as-is. Test each helper independently.

risks.title: Performance Regression
risks.description: Alloy framework overhead may slow code generation for very large service specs.
risks.mitigation: Benchmark against legacy emitter on large specs. Alloy is optimized for codegen.
